description_long: This rifle features a wooden stock and foregrip, with a dark metal receiver and barrel assembly. The most striking feature is the row of large, pointed metal spikes attached beneath the barrel, giving it a menacing, almost improvised appearance. The bolt-action mechanism is visible on the right side, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights. The wood is a rich brown, contrasting with the matte black metal components. A leather or fabric strap is attached near the rear, suggesting it can be slung over the shoulder for transport.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, featuring prominent metal spikes under the barrel and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the wooden stock, and the row of metal spikes beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the alignment of the spikes and the circular muzzle opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle and the continuation of the spiked underbarrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the bolt handle and the end of the stock.
